s -l /app/caffe/examples/cifar10/cifar10_quick_iter_500.caffemodel
python3 - << 'PY'
import re, sys, json
log = '/app/caffe/training_output.txt'
s = open(log, 'r', errors='ignore').read()
# Extract last reported train accuracy (from Train net output ... accuracy)
train_accs = [float(x) for x in re.findall(r'Train net output #[0-9]+: accuracy = ([0-9.]+)', s)]
train_acc = train_accs[-1] if train_accs else None
# Extract final test accuracy (ideally at Iteration 500 testing) but fall back to last test accuracy
# Test lines look like: Test net output #0: accuracy = 0.5
test_accs = [float(x) for x in re.findall(r'Test net output #[0-9]+: accuracy = ([0-9.]+)', s)]
test_acc = test_accs[-1] if test_accs else None
ok = None
msg = ''
if test_acc is None:
    ok = False
    msg = 'No test accuracy found in log.'
else:
    if train_acc is None:
        msg = 'Train accuracy not found; proceeding to compare test accuracy to threshold only.'
        ok = test_acc > 0.45
    else:
        ok = (test_acc > 0.45) and (test_acc >= train_acc - 0.05)
        msg = f'train_acc={train_acc:.4f}, test_acc={test_acc:.4f}, threshold_ok={test_acc>0.45}, within_5pct={test_acc >= (train_acc-0.05):s}'
print(json.dumps({"train_acc": train_acc, "test_acc": test_acc, "ok": ok, "message": msg}))
PY
